I need to get the names of these other features from my other system.

Patch Set 1:

> I need to get the names of these other features from my other
 > system.

In my local document where I track used connection flags I see:

 #define OBD_CONNECT2_MKDIR_REPLAY    0x10000000ULL /* striped dir mkdir replay 47385 */
 #define OBD_CONNECT2_DMV_IMP_INHERIT 0x20000000ULL /* client does DMV inherit 47788 */

and names "mkdir_replay" and "dmv_inherit" in the obd_connect_names[] array.

parents.subject: LU-16159 lod: cancel update llogs upon recovery abort

commit.subject: LU-16205 sec: reserve flag for fid2path for encrypted files
commit.message:
LU-16205 sec: reserve flag for fid2path for encrypted files

Reserve OBD_CONNECT2_ENCRYPT_FID2PATH connection flag for fid2path
support for encrypted files.
This connection flag is required so that newer servers continue to
return -ENODATA to older clients.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I505b90a061687a7ef481adacca98908c96e487be
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/49028
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
